overall.description: A cinematic view of a gothic great hall from a video game, featuring floating candles, long dining tables with seated figures, and large stained glass windows. The scene is lit by warm candlelight mixed with cool ambient light from the windows, creating a magical atmosphere reminiscent of Hogwarts.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic castle great hall with floating candles and long dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary at the rear of the hall, observing the dining area and other students seated at the tables

notable_agents.action: seated figure in white robes at the rightmost table, facing away from camera

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air throughout the hall, providing warm flickering light
large ornate stained glass window at the far end of the hall with blue and purple tones
long wooden dining tables with benches, occupied by students, running along the left side
long wooden dining tables with benches, occupied by students, running along the right side
tall gothic stone arches and columns lining the sides of the hall
polished stone tile floor with reflections of the candlelight

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a grand gothic dining hall from a video game, likely Hogwarts. Floating candles illuminate the space with warm light while cool blue light filters through the large stained glass window at the far end. Long dining tables line both sides of the central aisle, populated by seated students. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the magical atmosphere and architectural details of the stone arches and marble floors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic vista of a grand gothic dining hall where warm candlelight blends with cool ambient tones. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, focusing on the interplay between the floating candles and the deep blue light filtering through a distant stained glass window. As the eye wanders across the space, the view encompasses long dining tables lined with seated students, emphasizing the symmetry of the central aisle. The scene remains poised and still, allowing the architectural details of the stone arches and polished marble floors to define the magical atmosphere.
